overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk from the Sunset Motel through a desert wasteland toward a highway. The scene transitions from a colorful retro-futuristic motel courtyard through arid terrain with Joshua trees and power lines, ending at a road with large commercial billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned motel parking lot with retro architecture

events.description: passing a parked armored vehicle on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking through the motel parking lot past abandoned vehicles toward the desert exit

entered.detail: two-story orange and teal retro motel with large SUNSET sign on roof
green and black armored pickup truck with covered bed
tall palm tree rising above the motel structure
dark colored sedan parked near the motel entrance
futuristic skyscrapers visible in the hazy distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the Sunset Motel, a colorful retro-futuristic building with teal trim and an orange facade. The camera moves past a parked armored truck and other abandoned vehicles in the asphalt parking lot, with the Night City skyline visible in the distant haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert transition zone with traffic barriers

events.description: exiting the motel area into open desert wasteland
passing red and white concrete barriers marking the road edge

agents.ego_description: walking past concrete barriers into the desert landscape with industrial ruins ahead

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete dividers lining the path edge
desert yucca trees with spiky branches scattered across the terrain
tall electrical transmission towers with multiple cross-arms

segments.scene_description: Leaving the motel behind, the scene opens into a wide desert expanse. The camera passes red and white concrete barriers and enters terrain dotted with Joshua trees. Power pylons line the left side while the distant city skyline shifts to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: arid desert wilderness with rock formations

events.description: navigating around large reddish rock formations in the desert terrain

agents.ego_description: walking through desert terrain with scattered vegetation and rock outcrops toward the industrial valley

entered.detail: reddish-brown boulders and rock outcrops rising from the sandy ground
dry bushes and tumbleweeds across the desert floor

segments.scene_description: Deep in the desert wilderness, the camera moves past Joshua trees and large reddish rock formations. The terrain is sandy with sparse scrub vegetation, while massive power pylons and industrial ruins dominate the left horizon and the city towers remain visible to the right.

events.description: approaching paved highway with large commercial billboards
black vehicle passes by on the highway to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the highway shoulder passing under large commercial billboards

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the highway passing from right to left

entered.detail: large commercial advertising screens on metal frameworks including a prominent HOLOUNDEAD poster
paved two-lane road with vehicles traveling along it
steep rocky embankment supporting the highway and billboards

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a paved highway dominated by massive commercial billboards mounted on metal frameworks. The camera walks along the roadside past rocky cliffs, with vehicles occasionally passing by on the asphalt. Industrial ruins and power lines fill the background valley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant retro-futuristic motel courtyard into a desolate desert wasteland that eventually meets a commercial highway. It begins at the Sunset Motel, moving past an armored truck and abandoned vehicles in an asphalt lot with the distant Night City skyline shimmering in the haze. As the camera leaves the motel behind, the scene opens into a wide desert expanse where red and white concrete barriers give way to sandy terrain dotted with Joshua trees and towering power pylons. The journey continues deeper into the wilderness, passing large reddish rock formations and sparse scrub vegetation while the city towers shift further to the right. Finally, the camera approaches a paved highway, walking past rocky cliffs and massive commercial billboards mounted on metal frameworks as industrial ruins fill the background valley.
